title: Notification Settings
subtitle: Manage all notifications

permission.description: Grant notification permission to receive reminders

creditCard.title: Credit Card
creditCard.paymentReminderDesc: Notification when payment due date is approaching
creditCard.goldenWindowDesc: Notification on days offering the longest payment term
creditCard.statementReminderDesc: Notification when statement date is approaching

overdueDetails.title: Overdue Notification Details
overdueDetails.frequencyDesc: How often to receive overdue notifications

timing.title: Timing
timing.daysBeforeDesc: How many days before the due date to send a reminder
timing.notificationTimeDesc: Time of day for daily notifications

loanSection.title: Loans & Installments
loanSection.paymentReminderDesc: Notification when installment due date is approaching
loanSection.daysBeforeDesc: How many days before the installment date

taxSection.title: Tax & Returns
taxSection.reminderDaysDesc: How many days before the tax deadline

familySection.title: Family Finance
familySection.activityNotificationDesc: Notification when a member adds expense, income, budget or goal changes
familySection.budgetAlertDesc: Notification when approaching monthly budget limit
familySection.goalReminderDesc: Notification before financial goal deadline expires
familySection.recurringExpenseDesc: When recurring expense payment date is approaching
familySection.subscriptionRenewalDesc: Notification when subscription renewal date is approaching

investmentSection.title: Investment
investmentSection.priceAlertDesc: When there is a significant change in investment prices

assetSection.title: Vehicle & Property
assetSection.vehicleInspectionDesc: Graduated reminders as vehicle inspection date approaches
assetSection.rentDueDesc: Notification when rent payment date is approaching
assetSection.contractRenewalDesc: Notification when lease contract renewal date is approaching
assetSection.recurringBillDesc: Notification when recurring bill payment date is approaching

test.sentDesc: You will receive a notification in a few seconds.
test.notSupported: Push notifications may not be supported on this device.
test.overdueDesc: You will receive a notification if you have overdue payments.

webNote: Push notifications only work in the native mobile app. Notifications are shown as toasts in the web browser.

push.paymentTodayBody: {{bank}} {{card}} payment is due today. Don't forget to pay.
push.paymentTomorrowBody: {{bank}} {{card}} payment is due tomorrow. Check your balance.
push.goldenWindowBody: Shop today with {{bank}} {{card}} and get 40+ days interest-free! Smart move.
push.statementReminderBody: {{bank}} {{card}} statement date is tomorrow. Current balance: {{amount}} TL.
push.cardOverdueBody: {{bank}} {{card}} — {{days}} days overdue. Debt: {{debt}} TL + {{total}} TL interest. Daily interest: {{daily}} TL.
push.loanOverdueBody: {{bank}} {{name}} — {{days}} days overdue. Installment: {{payment}} TL + {{total}} TL interest. Daily: {{daily}} TL.
push.budgetAlertBody: {{category}} — you've used {{percentage}}% ({{spent}} / {{allocated}} TL). {{daysLeft}} days left, {{dailyLeft}} TL per day to stay on track.
push.budgetExceededBody: You've exceeded your {{category}} budget. {{spent}} / {{allocated}} TL. Review your spending.
push.goalDeadlineBody: "{{name}}" goal deadline is in {{days}} days. Remaining: {{remaining}} TL ({{progress}}% done).
push.recurringExpenseBody: "{{name}}" recurring expense ({{amount}} TL) is due in {{days}} days.
push.subscriptionRenewalBody: "{{name}}" {{cycle}} subscription renews in {{days}} days ({{amount}} TL). Cancel now if you want to.
push.recurringBillBody: "{{name}}" bill ({{amount}} TL) is due in {{days}} days. Check your balance.
push.rentDueBody: Rent for {{name}} ({{amount}} TL) is due in {{days}} days.
push.vehicleInspectionUrgentBody: {{name}} ({{plate}}) inspection is tomorrow. Check your appointment.
push.vehicleInspectionOverdueBody: {{name}} ({{plate}}) inspection is overdue. Book an appointment to avoid fines.
push.investmentSummaryBody: You have {{count}} investments. Total value: {{total}} TL. Check the details.
push.quarterlyTaxBody: {{quarter}} quarterly tax deadline is in {{days}} days.
push.testBody: Awesome! Push notifications are working. You'll never miss a payment!
push.noOverdueBody: None of your payments are overdue. You're doing great! Keep it up.
push.overdueBody: {{count}} payments overdue. Total interest today: {{amount}} TL.
push.summaryCardOverdue: 💳 {{bank}} {{card}} — {{days}} days overdue. Today: {{daily}} TL interest. Total: {{total}} TL
push.summaryLoanOverdue: 🏦 {{bank}} {{name}} — {{days}} days overdue. Today: {{daily}} TL interest. Total: {{total}} TL
push.summaryTotal: ⚠️ {{count}} payments overdue. Total interest today: {{amount}} TL.
push.lowBalanceBody: Safe-to-spend balance dropped below {{amount}} TL. Watch your spending.
push.largeExpenseBody: A {{amount}} TL expense was recorded. Check the category.
push.familyBudgetLimitBody: You've reached your shared budget limit. Review spending together.
push.weeklyReportBody: You spent {{change}} compared to last week. Check your report.
push.monthlyReport: 🗓️ {{month}} is over. Where did the money go?
push.monthlyReportBody: Last month you spent the most on '{{topCategory}}'. Shall we plan the new month's budget?
push.proUpsellManualBody: Go PRO and save time with advanced features. First week is on us!
push.proUpsellProjectionBody: Will you have a cash crunch next month? Find out with PRO Projection.
push.securityNewDeviceBody: A new device logged into your account. If it wasn't you, check it out.
push.kmhInterestReminderBody: Your {{bank}} account has been negative for {{days}} days. {{interest}} TL interest so far. Try to clear the balance.
push.kmhCriticalBody: Your {{bank}} overdraft is at {{usage}}% — near the limit. Make a payment soon.
